nasb.text: And what one nation on the earth is like Your people Israel, whom God went to redeem for Himself as a people and to make a name for Himself, and to do a great thing for You and awesome things for Your land, before Your people whom You have redeemed for Yourself from Egypt, from nations and their gods?

esv.text: And who is like your people Israel, the one nation on earth whom God went to redeem to be his people, making himself a name and doing for them great and awesome things by driving out before your people, whom you redeemed for yourself from Egypt, a nation and its gods?

cnv.text: 世上有哪一個國家像你的子民以色列呢？　神曾親自救贖他們，使他們作自己的子民，又為他自己立名，為他們作了大事，為你的地作了可畏的事；在你的子民面前，就是你從埃及救贖出來歸你自己的子民面前，趕出了列國的人和他們的神。

ccb.text: 世上哪个民族比得上你的以色列子民呢？你从埃及救出他们，让他们做你的子民，又彰显你的大名，行神迹奇事，把列国及其神明从你的以色列子民面前赶走。
